title: Vall Kumauri

'''Vall Kumauri''' was a [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]] living around [[10,000 BBY]]. That [[Standard year/Legends|year]], the young Kumauri designed and built a line of revolutionary [[Kumauri Battleship|battleships]]. The [[Starship/Legends|vessels]] were equipped with [[Tractor beam projector/Legends|tractor beam projectors]] and [[Mass-driver cannon/Legends|mass driver cannons]], which could be used to hurl captured [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroids]] at enemy starships as well at [[Planet/Legends|planets]] as a form of [[Orbital bombardment/Legends|orbital bombardment]].

Using a [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] of the [[Battleship/Legends|battleships]], Kumauri forged an [[Kumauri Empire|empire]] by conquering dozens of [[Star system/Legends|star systems]] on the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic's]] periphery. The Republic engaged the Kumauri Empire in a brief [[Galactic Republic–Kumauri Empire war|conflict]], during which [[Vall Kumauri's flagship|Kumauri's flagship]] participated in a [[Battle between the Kumauri Empire and the Republic|battle]]. Ultimately, the Kumauri domain was defeated and eventually nearly forgotten, although Kumauri's legacy lived on through his battleship design, which proved influential in [[Space warfare/Legends|space warfare]] for [[Standard century/Legends|centuries]] to come, and the use of the [[madilon]] alloy, which remained crucial in [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] manufacture.

==Biography==
===Designing a battleship===
Vall Kumauri was a [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]]<ref name="CRO" /> who lived during the [[Ductavis Era]], a period of [[Time/Legends|time]] lasting from approximately [[11,000 BBY]] to [[9000 BBY]].<ref name="EGTW" /> In [[10,000 BBY]],<ref name="FF">{{FactFile|30|TRA 1-4|Tractor Beams}}</ref> the young<ref name="CRO" /> Kumauri designed and created<ref name="FF" /> a revolutionary new line of [[Battleship/Legends|battleship]] in the outlying regions of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. Grandiosely named the ''[[Kumauri Battleship]]'' after the warlord himself, the line consisted of<ref name="CRO" /> highly sophisticated<ref name="FF" /> massive [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ships]],<ref name="EGTW" /> each equipped with several [[Tractor beam projector/Legends|tractor beam projectors]] and an immense [[Mass-driver cannon/Legends|mass driver cannon]]<ref name="FF" /> serving as the [[Warship/Legends|warship's]] primary weapon.<ref name="CRO" />

[[File:KumauriWhatchamajigger-EGW.jpg|thumb|right|250px|Vall Kumauri designed a battleship line named after himself.]]
The [[Tractor beam/Legends|tractor beam]] projectors could be used to tow in [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroids]] and other [[Realspace/Legends|space]] debris into the [[Starship/Legends|starship]], which the mass driver [[Cannon/Legends|cannon]] would then accelerate to high velocities at enemy targets,<ref name="CRO" /> similarly to the ''[[planechanga]]'' [[Railgun/Legends|rail guns]] of the ancient [[Hutt Empire]].<ref name="EGTW" /> Such a tactic could be used to destroy enemy starships.<ref name="FF" /> In addition, since neither sufficiently powerful [[Planetary shield/Legends|planetary shield]] technology<ref name="CRO" /> nor [[Planet/Legends|planet]]-based weapons existed at the time, Kumauri's battleships could turn asteroids into [[Missile/Legends|missiles]] for the [[Orbital bombardment/Legends|orbital bombardment]] of planets.<ref name="EGTW" /> Small space rocks that were propelled in such manner were capable of destroying entire [[City/Legends|cities]], while larger asteroids possessed the potential to completely disrupt the ecological balance of a planet they were fired at.<ref name="CRO" /> Kumauri's innovation changed the paradigm of [[Space warfare/Legends|space warfare]], since for eons no capital ship had been equipped with weapons powerful enough to cause sustained damage on a planet's surface from space.<ref name="EGTW" />

Kumauri's ships also utilized [[madilon]]<ref name="EGTW" />—an alloy discovered in 10,000 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]] that naturally occurred on several planets such as [[Nyriaan/Legends|Nyriaan]]<ref name="GoI">''[[Galaxy of Intrigue]]''</ref>—which allowed the manufacture of smaller and more efficient [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] [[Engine/Legends|engines]]. The battleships also implemented advanced targeting techniques that, while less well-known, were arguably crucial to the vessels' success.<ref name="EGTW" />

===War and legacy===
Amassing a small [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] of the new battleships, Kumauri conquered several dozen [[Star system/Legends|star systems]] of the Republic's periphery<ref name="CRO" /> around 10,000 BBY<ref name="EGTW" /> giving rise to the [[Kumauri Empire]]. The warlord's fleet proved surprisingly effective,<ref name="CRO" /> and his battleships,<ref name="FF" /> especially the last of the line, the [[Cal-class battleship|''Cal''-class]],<ref name="CRO" /> became a symbol of extreme terror.<ref name="FF" /> The Galactic Republic was provoked by the emergence of the Kumauri Empire and engaged in a brief [[Galactic Republic–Kumauri Empire war|conflict]] with it. The war saw the first widespread use of large capital ships in approximately five [[Millennium/Legends|millennia]],<ref name="EGTW" /> and, during the conflict, [[Vall Kumauri's flagship|Kumauri's flagship]] participated in a [[Battle between the Kumauri Empire and the Republic|battle]] that was eventually depicted in a fresco in a [[Kumauri palace|Kumauri Empire palace]] on an [[Unidentified Outer Rim moon|Outer Rim Territories moon]].<ref name="The Palace of the Kumauri">{{TORcite|type=crewskill|Archaeology|The Palace of the Kumauri}}</ref>

Kumauri's empire was defeated by the Republic and imploded within a few [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the former's creation.<ref name="CRO" /> Although the civilization created by the warlord had become almost forgotten<ref name="The Palace of the Kumauri" /> by [[3643 BBY]],<ref name="3643 BBY">Per the reasoning [[Template:TOR_dates|here]], Act I of ''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]'' takes place around [[3643 BBY]]. Since players of ''The Old Republic'' can assign their companions on the mission "The Palace of the Kumauri" independently of the main class storyline at any point during the game, the mission must take place at some point around 3643 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]].</ref> the ''Kumauri Battleship'', which saw continued use in hundreds of other [[Navy/Legends|navies]], including [[Republic Navy/Legends|that]] of the Republic,<ref name="CRO" /> and which remained influential in space warfare for several [[Standard century/Legends|centuries]],<ref name="EGTW" /> remained as a legacy of his efforts.<ref name="CRO" /> Ultimately, however, Kumauri's most important innovation proved to be the use of madilon,<ref name="EGTW" /> which continued up until the reign of the [[Fel Empire]]<ref name="GoI" /> in [[130 ABY]].<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref>

==Skills and abilities==
Vall Kumauri had sufficient technical expertise to design and build<ref name="FF" /> a revolutionary battleship line.<ref name="CRO" />

==Behind the scenes==
Vall Kumauri was created by [[Paul Sudlow]] and was introduced in ''[[Cracken's Rebel Operatives]]'', a [[1994]] [[West End Games]] sourcebook published for use with ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="CRO" />
